title: Settings
description: Organization-wide system behavior. Changes apply to everyone.
language.title: Language & region
language.description: Personal display preferences. These apply to your account only.
language.displayLanguageDescription: Changes the interface language and text direction for your account only. Applies immediately — it is not part of the organization settings below.
processing.title: Document processing
processing.description: How uploaded EOBs are checked before they reach the review queue.
processing.validationDescription: Run a fast AI quality check after extraction. Surfaces a 0–100 score and field-level flags on the review page. Disabling skips the check (and its cost).
processing.strictDuplicatesDescription: In addition to the content fingerprint, also block re-uploading a file with the same name, size, and type. Turn off to rely on content hash only.
processing.autoAcceptDescription: Commit extracted claims straight to the ledger once processing finishes — no manual review. Turn off to approve or reject each upload by hand.
currency.title: Cost & currency
currency.description: Controls how AI extraction cost is shown to reviewers.
currency.rateDescription: 1 US dollar equals this many Egyptian pounds. Used to convert the per-document AI cost shown on the review screen.
form.rateInvalid: Exchange rate must be a positive number.
